summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Skimly MVP with new features: password reset flow, Stripe payment integration, and recommendations engine. All core and new features working correctly.
passed_tests: Landing page loads with hero and features sections
Auth page shows forgot password link
Forgot password page loads at /forgot-password with proper form
Reset password page loads at /reset-password with error handling
POST /api/auth/forgot-password endpoint works (200 response)
POST /api/auth/reset-password endpoint works (400 for invalid token)
Payment checkout endpoint - POST /api/payments/checkout (200 response)
Payment status endpoint - GET /api/payments/status/{session_id} (200 response)
Recommendations endpoint - GET /api/recommendations (200 response)
Settings page shows upgrade button with pricing ($12/mo) for free users
Dashboard shows recommendations section
User registration and login still work
Text analysis with GPT-5.2 works (structured output with key points, implications, actions)
Save and retrieve knowledge items functionality intact
Navigation between all pages working (Dashboard, Knowledge Base, Settings)
Free tier limits properly enforced (10/day displayed)
Pro features listed correctly in settings (unlimited analyses, Ask Your Brain, Weekly Digests, Priority support)
Profile management with intelligence profile sections (interests, goals, projects, themes)
Logout functionality works
Password reset flow complete with proper error handling
Stripe checkout integration functional
Recommendations engine returns structured data
All backend API endpoints (25/25) passing
Frontend UI fully functional with proper data-testid attributes

success_percentage.frontend: 100% (all UI flows and new features working)
